teams.name: Seattle Mariners
headlines: Mariners enter May with 16-16 record after one month of play
Rob Refsnyder hits go-ahead solo home run in 9th inning for 3-2 win

keyUpdates: Team sits at .500 after first month

details.playoffPicture: Early season - too soon to tell, but need to improve to compete in AL West

top_story.title: NBA Playoffs: Three Game 6 matchups tonight with tight spreads
top_story.summary: Three Game 6 NBA playoff matchups on Friday with -3.5 spreads in each game. Pistons vs Magic at 7pm ET, Cavaliers vs Raptors, and West matchups all feature tight competition as teams fight to advance.
